detaileddescription.para: It waits for the response from slave and reads the response.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd.
is the command value.

inbodydescription.para: < SIze of the command is 8 bits

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a interrupt mode send in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It sends data to the FIFO and waits for the slave to pick them up. If master fails to send data due arbitration lost or any other, will stop transfer with status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.
is the number of bytes to be sent.

inbodydescription.para: < Controller uses byte count during bus transaction

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a interrupt mode receive in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It sets the transfer size register so the slave can send data to us. The rest of the work is managed by interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd instance.
is the pointer to the recv buffer.
is the number of bytes to be recv.

inbodydescription.para: < Controller uses byte count during bus transaction

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a polled mode send in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It sends data to the FIFO and waits for the slave to pick them up. If master fails to send data due arbitration lost or any other error, will stop transfer status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.
is the number of bytes to be sent.

inbodydescription.para: < Controller uses byte count during bus transaction

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a polled mode receive in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It repeatedly sets the transfer size register so the slave can send data to us. It polls the data register for data to come in. If master fails to read data due arbitration lost or any other error, will return with status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is a pointer to the XI3c_Cmd instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.
is the number of bytes to be sent.

inbodydescription.para: < Controller uses byte count during bus transaction

briefdescription.para: This function reads the Rx Fifo during IBI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the status handler, which the driver calls when it encounters conditions that should be reported to the higher layer software.

detaileddescription.para: The handler executes in an interrupt context, so the amount of processing should be minimized
Refer to the xi3c.h file for a list of events. The events are defined to start with XI3C_EVENT_*.

InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
FunctionPtr
is the pointer to the callback function.
None.
The handler is called within interrupt context, so it should finish its work quickly.

briefdescription.para: The interrupt handler for the master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It does the protocol handling for the interrupt-driven transfers.

If the Master is receiving data then the data is read from the FIFO and the Master has to request for more data (if there is more data to receive). If all the data has been received then a completion event is signalled to the upper layer by calling the callback handler. It is an error if the amount of received data is more than expected.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.

briefdescription.para: This function setup for receive during IBI in interrupt mode.

detaileddescription.para: It enables the required interrupts for performing read operation during IBI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is the pointer to the recv buffer.

listitem.para: XST_NO_DATA if message buffer is NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function receives data during IBI in polled mode.

detaileddescription.para: It polls the data register for data to come in during IBI. If master fails to read data due to any error, it will return with status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
is the pointer to the recv buffer.
